description: Phase 12 QA/UAT exception governance and production readiness rules (analysis only, not production deployment).

UNBALANCED.recommended_remediation: Review Phase 6 family balancing profile; validate offset and lifecycle exclusions before re-gating

LOW_CONFIDENCE.recommended_remediation: Review balancing confidence and decomposition lineage; re-run derivation after upstream fixes

RESIDUAL_EXCESS.recommended_remediation: Review Phase 7C decomposition and residual analysis; do not force zero residual

RULEBOOK_GATING_FAILURE.recommended_remediation: Resolve upstream validation issue then re-run Phase 10B and Phase 11 gating

DERIVATION_FAILURE.recommended_remediation: Populate required derivation fields and re-run prototype generation

GATING_FAILURE.recommended_remediation: Review Phase 10A validation issues; resolve payee or confidence gaps

TRUSTEE_ROUTING.recommended_remediation: Refine trustee derivation gating in Phase 10A/11; trustee payments may be rulebook-ready with manual QA

INFERRED_PAYEE.recommended_remediation: Review payee hierarchy and PRELSA enrichment; confirm inferred distribution

LOW_CONFIDENCE.recommended_remediation: Improve payee confidence via Phase 8 distribution analysis

MISSING_PAYEE.recommended_remediation: Resolve payee via PRELSA or beneficiary staging before reprocessing

MISSING_CLAIM_HEADER.recommended_remediation: Accept parent claim into prototype or exclude orphan payment until claim balancing resolved

MPOLICY_MISMATCH.recommended_remediation: Align MPOLICY linkage between QUIKCLMS and QUIKCLMP crosswalk

duplicate_mseq_governance.recommended_remediation: Review MSEQ derivation per claim; ensure sequence uniqueness within MPOLICY+MPHASE scope

PAYMENT_COUNT_MISMATCH.recommended_remediation: Rejected or unstaged payments exist for claim; review payment gating and orphan linkage

AGGREGATION_MISMATCH.recommended_remediation: Compare MPAID vs sum(MAMOUNT); validate Phase 6 balancing and payment staging totals

EXPECTED_NON_PAYMENT_CLAIM.recommended_remediation: Financial-only claim without QUIKCLMP staging is expected for some families

NET_BALANCING_VARIANCE.recommended_remediation: Review MNETAMT vs payment totals; preserve residual visibility
